sql_array: CREATE TABLE encryption_test_simple(comment String, secret String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO encryption_test_simple VALUES('simple test', encrypt('aes-128-ecb', 'Hello World', '1234567890123456'));
UPDATE encryption_test_simple SET secret = encrypt('aes-192-cbc', 'Updated Secret', '123456789012345678901234') WHERE comment = 'simple test';
SELECT comment, hex(secret) FROM encryption_test_simple WHERE comment LIKE 'simple%';
INSERT INTO encryption_test_simple VALUES('test with AAD', encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'Data to encrypt', '12345678901234567890123456789012', 'iviviviviviviviv', 'additional data'));
